response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song '不安定な神様' from on-screen Japanese title. 2. Performer in video is Suara and VTuber Hakui Koyori. 3. Original artist for '不安定な神様' is Suara. 4. Used search tool to find full lyrics for '不安定な神様'. 5. Divided video into performance scene and talking scene. 6. Constructed JSON following schema.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a vocal performance of the song '不安定な神様' (Fuan tei na kamisama) by Suara, performed by Suara and VTuber Hakui Koyori, followed by a discussion between the two about the game 'Utawarerumono: False Mask'.

scenes.description: The song '不安定な神様' (Fuan tei na kamisama) is performed by Suara and Hakui Koyori on a virtual stage. Lyrics and song title appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
不安定な神様
繰り返す出会いと別れ
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人
あなたが泣いている
流るる涙の雨
泣くなとは言わない
心かなしくて
生きとし生けるもの
何かを背負いながら
見えない鎖につながれている
どれほど救われただろう
あどけない笑顔を
なくしたくはない

不安定な神様
繰り返す過去と未来
生まれそして死んでゆく運命
掛け違えた世界で
繰り返す出会いと別れ
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人

けがれのない心
黒く染めゆきながら
抑えられなくて
解き放たれる
何回名を呼んだだろう
あどけない笑顔は
もうどこにもない

不安定な神様
引き継いだ夢と愛を
育て守り託しゆく運命
掛け違えた世界で
探すたび引き裂かれても
また会えると信じて
時かける旅人

不安定な神様
繰り返す過去と未来
生まれそして死んでゆく運命
掛け違えた世界で
繰り返す出会いと別れ
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人
また会えるその日まで
時かける旅人
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unstable God,
Repeating encounters and partings,
Until the day we can meet again,
A time-traveling traveler.
You are crying,
The falling rain of tears,
I won't tell you not to cry,
Because my heart hurts.
All living things,
While bearing something on their backs,
Are connected by invisible chains.
How much have I been saved?
I don't want to lose,
That innocent smile.

Unstable God,
Repeating the past and the future,
Destined to be born and die,
In a world where things have gone wrong.
Repeating encounters and partings,
Until the day we can meet again,
A time-traveling traveler.
While staining the innocent heart black,
I cannot hold it back,
It is set free.
How many times did I call your name?
The innocent smile,
Is nowhere to be found anymore.

Unstable God,
Inherited dreams and love,
Destined to grow, protect, and entrust,
In a world where things have gone wrong.
Even if we are torn apart whenever we search,
I believe we can meet again,
A time-traveling traveler.
Unstable God,
Repeating the past and the future,
Destined to be born and die,
In a world where things have gone wrong.
Repeating encounters and partings,
Until the day we can meet again,
A time-traveling traveler.
Until the day we can meet again,
A time-traveling traveler.

scenes.description: Following the performance, Suara and Hakui Koyori talk about the song, the game 'Utawarerumono: False Mask', and their experiences recording and performing it.
